title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support, model management, and RAG plugins.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store; includes Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and minimal dependencies; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Electron desktop app for chatting with Ollama models offline; markdown and code highlighting.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder for building end-to-end NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio, serde, and exhaustive model/chat APIs; published on crates.io.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community extension that embeds Ollama models into Camunda 8 worker tasks for human-like decisions.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM summarization and Q&A to your vault notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: Official n8n node for Ollama enabling no-code LLM workflows with 200+ integrations.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses in chat with slash commands and context.

title: ollama-llama-index
summary: LlamaIndex integration to use Ollama models as LLM or embedding backends for RAG and agents.
